title: Glass shot-depth tolerance (default 2.0) accepts prop hits retail rejects in sub_GAME_7F04E720/7F04E9BC depth gates
repro: A/B: GE007_GLASS_SHOT_DEPTH_TOLERANCE=0 (retail gate) vs unset (2.0 default); shoot glass pane coplanar with BG collision (e.g. Dam GE007_AUTO_DAMAGE_TAG=19); compare hit acceptance / crack spawn / RNG stream

history.note: ASM audit batch 5. Retail sub_GAME_7F04E720 rejects the object hit outright when -transformed.z > shotdata->unk34 (c.le.s $f0,$f10 + bc1fl return, chrobjhandler.c:38806-38811); the live C adds a NATIVE_PORT-only acceptance window objectShotDepthWithinGlassTolerance (chrobjhandler.c:664-677) for PROPDEF_GLASS/TINTED_GLASS: when depth<=limit+tolerance the hit is ACCEPTED and neg_z clamped to unk34. Same addition in the coarse gate sub_GAME_7F04E9BC (C 38890). Tolerance defaults to 2.0f (chrobjhandler.c:86), env-tunable via GE007_GLASS_SHOT_DEPTH_TOLERANCE (0 disables => byte-retail). In-code rationale: glass panes coplanar with BG collision should attach cracks to the pane, not the wall behind. Sim-visible by default: extra accepted prop hit => hits[] queue entry via sub_GAME_7F03B9C0, crack/shatter bookkeeping, extra RNG draws. Intentional mitigation for an n64 depth-tie artifact but currently default-ON with no ledger/QUIRKS registration and no faithful-mode default decision; env control exists but is not a GE007_NO_* negative-control flag per charter rule 4 polarity. Related (distinct): FID-0004 shatter/opacity/crack-fade parity (renderer surface).

Root-caused: retail sub_GAME_7F04E720/7F04E9BC reject any object hit behind the limit plane (c.le.s + bc1fl); the port added a default-2.0 glass acceptance window (sim/RNG-visible deviation), a charter rule-4 flag-polarity violation. Faithful default = tolerance 0.0.
Decision: 2.0 units is far larger than float epsilon, so the window is a deliberate cosmetic mitigation, not a precision fix. Charter rule 4 -> opt-in (default OFF/faithful). Registered QUIRKS.md M1.
Pure helper glassShotDepthAccept factored + default flipped 2.0f->0.0f in chrobjhandler.c.

FIXED: default 2.0f->0.0f (faithful, retail-exact rejection); glass-crack window now opt-in via GE007_GLASS_SHOT_DEPTH_TOLERANCE>0. Pure helper src/platform/glass_shot_depth.c; ROM-free fail-on-revert ctest glass_shot_depth pins both sides. Sim byte-identical: sim_state_hash + struct_layout PASS + all 7 golden tapes byte-exact. Verified-promotion awaits an ares glass-shot oracle (shared w/ FID-0004). Opt-in registered QUIRKS.md M1.
